name: Dental Practice Introduction
description: 3-step intro sequence for dental practices — Client Zero test

steps.body_template:
Hi {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company_name}} in {{industry}} — I'm working on a tool that helps practices like yours find new patients through targeted local outreach.

Would you be open to a quick 10-minute chat about how you're currently attracting new patients? I'm genuinely curious about what works and what doesn't in your area.

No pitch, just research. Happy to share what we've learned from other practices too.

Cheers,
Dave
Keiracom

Hi {{first_name}},

Just following up on my note from a few days ago. I know you're busy running a practice — completely understand if now isn't the right time.

If you've got 10 minutes this week, I'd love to hear how {{company_name}} handles patient acquisition. We're building something specifically for Australian dental practices and your perspective would be really valuable.

Either way, no worries at all.

Cheers,
Dave
Keiracom

Hi {{first_name}},

Last email from me on this — I don't want to be a pest.

If finding new patients is something {{company_name}} is thinking about, I'd genuinely love 10 minutes of your time. If not, I'll leave you in peace.

Either way, wishing {{company_name}} all the best.

Cheers,
Dave
Keiracom
